channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nadia Nakai Clarifies Relationship Rumours and Discusses Tropika Island of Treasure
item.description: Rapper Nadia Nakai has set the record straight regarding her social media buzz with Toss, confirming that they are not romantically involved. The speculation followed a Valentine’s Day video in which ...

item.title: Toronto Police Officer Sustains Injuries in West End Traffic Collision
item.description: A Toronto police officer was injured in a traffic collision with another driver in the city’s west end. Emergency services responded promptly to the scene, and the officer was transported to a local h...

item.title: Niger Delta Games Highlight Sports’ Role in Youth Empowerment and Community Development
item.description: Director General of the National Sports Commission, Bukola Olopade, talk say sports no be only about who go collect medal, but e dey involve passion sharing, community engagement, economic empowerment...

item.title: King Charles highlights Commonwealth's unifying role amid global conflicts and climate challenges in annual message
item.description: In his Commonwealth Day message, King Charles III emphasises the importance of traditional alliances and international friendships during a period of 'increasing pressures of conflict', referencing on...

item.title: Minor explosion damages US embassy entrance in Oslo, no casualties: Norwegian police investigate
item.description: An explosion occurred at the US embassy in Oslo, Norway, in the early hours of Sunday, March 8, 2026, around 1am local time. According to Oslo police, the blast caused only minor material damage to on...

item.title: Sialkot Petrol Station Worker Killed, Two Injured After Refusing to Fill Jerry Cans
item.description: In Sialkot, a petrol station incident turned fatal after the government announced a Rs55 per litre hike in petrol prices. Hassan Khan, a worker at a filling station in Hajipura, refused to fill jerry ...

item.title: India relies on Kishan and Dube to tackle New Zealand spinners ahead of T20 World Cup final
item.description: India have found reliable weapons in Ishan Kishan and Shivam Dube to counter New Zealand's spin attack ahead of the T20 World Cup final. New Zealand, led by left-arm spinner Mitchell Santner, have his...

item.title: Bronze Age Sheep Bone Yields First Ancient Yersinia pestis Genome in Livestock, Shedding Light on Prehistoric Plague Spread
item.description: Researchers have identified the bacterium Yersinia pestis in the remains of a domesticated sheep dating back about 4,000 years from the Arkaim site in the Southern Ural Mountains, Russia. This marks t...

item.title: Iranian leader's son owns London properties near Israeli embassy, raising security concerns
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, owns two luxury apartments in Kensington, west London, overlooking the Israeli embassy. Valued at over £50 million, these sixth a...

item.title: SexBomb Girls Adjust UAE Concert Dates and Confirm Cagayan de Oro for Regional Tour
item.description: The popular Filipino dance group SexBomb Girls has officially rescheduled their upcoming shows in the United Arab Emirates due to unforeseen circumstances. Fans who had already secured tickets are adv...

item.title: Oga Obinna Offers KSh 1,000 to Watchman to Help Him Through Flooded Parking
item.description: YouTuber Oga Obinna shared a video showing how Nairobi's heavy rains and floods on March 6 affected his commute home. After arriving at his house, Obinna found the parking lot completely submerged, in...

item.title: Burna Boy Becomes African Artist with Most Certified Songs in New Zealand
item.description: Burna Boy, di Nigerian global superstar wey don put Afrobeats for world map, don extend him record as di African artist with most certified songs for New Zealand. Him latest success come as him collab...

item.title: Coimbatore police secure conviction in gang-rape case within 125 days
item.description: The Coimbatore City Police successfully concluded the investigation and secured a conviction in a gang-rape case within 125 days, demonstrating swift action in a sensitive criminal matter. City Police...

item.title: Plans for Johana Ng’eno Documentary Revealed After Nick Kosgei’s Death
item.description: Journalist Nick Kosgei tragically passed away in a helicopter crash on February 29, 2026, which also claimed the lives of Emurua Dikirr MP Johanna Ng'eno, her associates, and the pilot. Kosgei, who wa...

item.title: Government introduces strategies to support Tanzania’s cocoa sector amid global price slump
item.description: The Tanzanian government has introduced several strategies to stabilize and revive the cocoa sector after prices fell sharply, worrying farmers and industry stakeholders. Prices have dropped from arou...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Commits Sh800 Billion to Upgrade Electricity Infrastructure by 2028
item.description: Zanzibar is taking serious steps to fix the frequent electricity outages that have been troubling residents. The government has committed Sh800 billion to upgrade the islands' power infrastructure. Cu...

item.title: Milford FC reach Nedbank Cup semi-finals after dramatic penalty shoot-out against Sekhukhune United
item.description: Milford FC pulled off a remarkable upset in the Nedbank Cup quarter-finals, defeating Sekhukhune United after a tense penalty shoot-out at the Peter Mokaba Stadium in Polokwane. The KwaZulu-Natal side...

item.title: Trump sets terms for Iran amid escalating US-Israeli military strikes
item.description: US President Donald Trump has posted on social media that the US will only accept 'unconditional surrender' from Iran as part of ending military hostilities. The announcement came shortly after Irania...

item.title: Ex-IGP Egbetokun Makes Last-Minute Redeployments of Senior Police Officers Before Handover
item.description: As Egbetokun prepare hand over to Acting IGP Tunji Disu, the former IGP carry out last-minute redeployments wey affect several senior officers across Nigeria Police Force. According to internal police...

item.title: Thousands displaced after Quezon City shantytown fire
item.description: A devastating fire struck a densely populated shantytown along NIA Road in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City, on the night of March 6, 2026, leaving at least 4,000 families without homes. The fire starte...
